mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth above 100k signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k monthly growth.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and stable inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicates a healthy economic expansion, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combination of GDPC1 growth and CPIAUCSL stability fails to produce positive 60-day returns in 50%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) during post-recession recoveries signal improving demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of RSAFS and HOUST fails to generate positive 20-day returns in 50%+ of cases during recovery periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in CPI inflation below 2% suggests central banks will maintain accommodative policies, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL declines by >0.5% monthly.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) indicates strong manufacturing activity, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to produce positive 5-day returns in 50%+ of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 7% signals tightening labor markets that support corporate profit growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.3pp monthly.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of falling FEDFUNDS and stable CPIAUCSL indicates a dovish monetary policy environment, creating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint decline in FEDFUNDS and stable CPIAUCSL fails to generate positive 60-day returns in 50%+ of cases.
